description_long: This cafe is a modern, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a combination of light tan stone and dark gray paneling on its exterior. The front facade features a prominent Starbucks logo above the main entrance, which is flanked by large glass windows. An outdoor seating area with several tables and green umbrellas is enclosed by a metal fence, providing a welcoming space for customers. The building includes a drive-thru lane on one side, with green awnings over the service windows. The roof has distinct sections, including a raised area and a utility enclosure, likely for HVAC or other equipment. The surrounding pavement and sidewalk areas are clearly defined, supporting both pedestrian and vehicle access.
description: A modern Starbucks cafe with a flat roof, stone and dark panel exterior, outdoor seating, and drive-thru lane.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, Starbucks signage, large windows, and outdoor seating with green umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the drive-thru lane, green awnings, and the building's utility enclosure on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, roof utility area, and the drive-thru exit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outdoor seating area, fenced patio, and the side of the building with large windows.
